supportLevel: Unofficial public Microsoft Fabric status mirror based on HTML scraping

active.detailsHtml: Power BI Customers may experience failures while refreshing Power BI Dataflow Gen1 objects, encountering the error: “You’ve reached the refresh limit for your account. Please try again later".Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
active.detailsText: Power BI Customers may experience failures while refreshing Power BI Dataflow Gen1 objects, encountering the error: “You’ve reached the refresh limit for your account. Please try again later".Engineers are investigating the issue and an update will be provided soon.
